title: ApiScenariosBundleRequestV1
description: ScenarioBundle — one JSON document submitted to POST /v1/scenarios/apply that provisions agents, compiles a workflow, and submits an intent in a single atomic operation.

scenario_id.description: Stable identifier for this scenario definition, e.g. 'approval.nginx_rollout.v1'.

idempotency_key.description: If provided, duplicate submissions with the same key return the original intent instead of creating a new one.

agents.description: Service-account agents that participate in this scenario.

humans.description: Human participants (org members) that may be assigned approval or task steps.

workflow.description: Inline workflow definition or reference to a pre-compiled macro.

intent.description: Intent submission settings — type, payload, deadline, reminders, delivery limits.

role.description: Logical role alias used to reference this agent in workflow steps.

address.description: Agent address — either a short SA name or full agent:// URI.

create_if_missing.description: If true, a service account is automatically created when the address is not registered.

role.description: Logical role alias used to reference this human in workflow steps.

contact.description: Email address or org_member_id of the human participant.

macro_id.description: ID of a pre-registered macro template to use. When set, 'steps' are used as parameter overrides only.

steps.description: Ordered list of workflow steps. Required when macro_id is not provided.

step_id.description: Unique step identifier within this workflow.

tool_id.description: Tool to execute at this step.

assigned_to.description: Role alias or agent address that owns this step. Used to update pending_with on each workflow tick.

requires_approval.description: When true, the workflow pauses at this step until a human submits resume_intent with task_result.

step_deadline_seconds.description: Maximum seconds this step may run before being failed with 'step_timeout'.

human_task.description: Structured task description shown to the human when requires_approval=true.

remind_after_seconds.description: Seconds to wait before sending the first reminder to the human assigned to this step.

remind_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between subsequent reminders after the first.

max_reminders.description: Maximum number of reminders before escalating to escalate_to.

escalate_to.description: Role alias or address to escalate to once max_reminders is reached.

on_success.description: step_id to transition to on success. Omit to end the workflow.

on_failure.description: step_id to transition to on failure. Omit to fail the workflow.

form_schema.description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for validating task_result submitted by the human.

deadline_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC datetime after which the intent is automatically transitioned to TIMED_OUT.

remind_after_seconds.description: Seconds after which the first reminder is sent to the human holder.

max_delivery_attempts.description: Maximum agent delivery failures before transitioning to FAILED.
